requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 Transport Safety — Timor-Leste BESS Export
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3及IEC 62281运输安全——东帝汶BESS出口
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3及IEC 62281運輸安全——東帝汶BESS出口

summary.en: UN 38.3 remains mandatory for international transport of lithium cells and battery packs and must be presented as shipment documentation irrespective of destination. Timor-Leste import flows are commonly routed through Dili main port by sea or transshipment. There is no Timor-Leste-specific exemption from the international lithium dangerous-goods transport regime. Exporters should ensure transport classifications, labeling, and documentation are maintained throughout the route and aligned with transport mode.
summary.zh: UN 38.3仍是锂电芯和电池包国际运输的强制要求，必须随货文件提交，不受目的地影响。东帝汶进口通常经由Dili主港进行海运或中转。东帝汶没有对国际锂电池运输规则的例外豁免。出口商应确保运输分类、标记和文件在全程线路中保持一致，并与运输方式匹配。
summary.zht: UN 38.3仍是鋰電芯和電池包國際運輸的強制要求，必須隨貨文件提交，不受目的地影響。東帝汶進口通常經由Dili主港進行海運或轉運。東帝汶沒有對國際鋰電池運輸規則的例外豁免。出口商應確保運輸分類、標記和文件在全程航線中保持一致，並與運輸方式匹配。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
IEC 62281:2019+AMD1:2022 — Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries During Transport
IATA DGR, IMDG Code, and any applicable ADR/RID requirements for multimodal segments
Dili Port acceptance and shipping documentation practices for dangerous goods

summary.en: China export logistics teams commonly rely on UN 38.3 test summaries from CNAS/ILAC-accredited or internationally recognized labs such as UL or SGS. Timor-Leste receives these documents as the starting point, but route-specific declarations and package-condition checks remain required for each shipment and each battery configuration.
summary.zh: 中国出口物流通常使用来自CNAS/ILAC认定或UL、SGS等国际认可实验室的UN 38.3测试摘要。东帝汶以此作为起点接受，但每次出货都必须补充路线特定声明与包装状态核验。
summary.zht: 中國出口物流通常使用來自CNAS/ILAC認定或UL、SGS等國際認可實驗室的UN 38.3測試摘要。東帝汶以此作為起點接受，但每次出貨都必須補充路線特定聲明與包裝狀態核驗。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test summary covering the exact model, chemistry, and configuration
CNAS/ILAC-aligned lithium test report repositories used by Chinese exporters
Carrier dangerous-goods declaration and packing instructions aligned to route

gap.en: The core gap for Timor-Leste import is document scope and continuity: a UN 38.3 test summary for the exact exported model plus route-complete transport documentation. Dili port operations require stable dangerous-goods declarations; any model, chemistry, or packaging change requires a documentation refresh.
gap.zh: 东帝汶进口的核心差距在于文件范围和持续性：须有覆盖具体出口型号的UN 38.3测试摘要，以及贯穿运输路线的完整文件。Dili港危险品作业需稳定完整的声明；型号、化学体系或包装变化都要求更新文件。
gap.zht: 東帝汶進口的核心差距在於文件範圍和持續性：須有涵蓋具體出口型號的UN 38.3測試摘要，以及貫穿運輸路線的完整文件。Dili港危險品作業需穩定完整的聲明；型號、化學體系或包裝變更都要求更新文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all lithium battery shipments, including those routed through Dili port; no known Timor-Leste domestic exemption
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese exporters and transporters under international dangerous-goods transport law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a generic dangerous-goods package is transferable without model- and route-specific checks. For Timor-Leste via Dili, confirm UN 38.3 test summary currency, DGS declaration consistency, and packaging status at each shipment handoff.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假设通用危险品包装文件可直接套用到所有出货。对于经Dili入境东帝汶的项目，应在每次发运确认UN 38.3测试摘要时效、危险品声明一致性和每段运输中的包装状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假設通用危險品包裝文件可直接套用到所有出貨。對於經Dili入境東帝汶的項目，應在每次發運確認UN 38.3測試摘要時效、危險品聲明一致性及每段運輸中的包裝狀態。
